title: If Neon Genesis Evangelion became Battlestar Galactica
display_title: If Neon Genesis Evangelion became Battlestar Galactica
wikitext:
[]: If Neon Genesis Evangelion became Battlestar Galactica             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Mon Feb 01, 2010 10:29 pm So I started watching "Battlestar Galactica (2004)" first season... and it occured to me that some or most of the characters would look or act like the characters from "Neon Genesis Evangelion" Here is what I think they look like... Gendo Ikari as "Admiral William Adama" Kozo Fuyutsuki as Saul Tigh Ritsuko Akagi as Laura Roslin (why not?) Kensuke Aida as assistant to Lauren Roslin, Billy Keikeya (could happen) Misato Katsuragi as Kara Thrace "Starbuck" Shinji Ikari as Lee Adama "Apollo" (more mature and older) (son of William Adama) Ryoji Kaji as "Dr. Gaius Baltar" Asuka Langley Soryu as "Six (Caprica)" (I'm aware that both have different hair styles, but hey, the relationship of Kaji and Asuka is more broader and similar to Battlestar Galatica...) Rei Ayanami as "Sharon Valerii" Toji Suzuhara as "Galen Tyrol" Other NERV employees, including Makoto Hyuga, Maya Ibuki, and Shigeru Aoba, working under the main system in the ship. I'm aware that there are more characters coming into Battlestar Galatica, but these are just the primary characters that look like the "Neon Genesis Evangelion" characters. The plot will be different, but this is just something that came to my mind... Could it be coincidence?

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Mon Feb 01, 2010 10:35 pm WAIT, ONE MORE THING... SEELE still is there...

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Feb 01, 2010 10:52 pm Rei is obviously a cylon.

[]: Re: If Neon Genesis Evangelion became "Battlestar Galac             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Feb 02, 2010 12:08 am tomrule123 wrote:

[]: Re: If Neon Genesis Evangelion became "Battlestar Galac             Quote Post by Allemann » Tue Feb 02, 2010 1:24 am tomrule123 wrote: Misato Katsuragi as Kara Thrace "Starbuck"

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Feb 02, 2010 1:57 am If what I have heard is true then were NGE Battlestar Galactica, the final scene would indeed be the Adam & Eve scenario.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Tue Feb 02, 2010 9:53 am Sammaeloo wrote: Rei is obviously a cylon.

[]: Re: If Neon Genesis Evangelion became "Battlestar Galac             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Tue Feb 02, 2010 9:57 am Allemann wrote: tomrule123 wrote: Misato Katsuragi as Kara Thrace "Starbuck"

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 02, 2010 10:14 am Damn. Next time my friends and I sit down to watch BSG. This is going to pop into my head.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Feb 02, 2010 10:29 am battlestar is just leftist liberal propaganda how dare you compare it with eva and Misato isn't 3D pig disgusting, this is heresy!

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Tue Feb 02, 2010 1:30 pm Trolling again Xard?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Feb 02, 2010 8:20 pm Xard wrote: battlestar is just leftist liberal propaganda

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Wed Feb 03, 2010 3:22 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Not much of a correlation between the two casts. Also, the Eva cast doesn't say "Frak" enough.

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Wed Feb 03, 2010 3:59 pm The fact that you turned Misato into a butch woman makes this thread fail.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryjin » Wed Feb 03, 2010 5:41 pm Xard wrote: battlestar is just leftist liberal propaganda how dare you compare it with eva

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Feb 03, 2010 7:02 pm You guys are taking Xard’s post way to seriously. I’m pretty sure he was just trolling.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryjin » Wed Feb 03, 2010 7:07 pm You know that just dawned on me and I was just about to put an edit to my post to include that possibility, so Xard if you your just joking, sorry man my political hair trigger has its own political hair trigger and if you weren't..... oh boy this country's in a lot of trouble.....
